brand.title: Allocation Studio
brand.tagline: AI-assisted stock distribution for global retail
brand.demo: Demo project · Not affiliated with On AG

about.title: About this demo
about.subtitle: A portfolio project by Gemma Garcia de la Fuente for the Senior Retail Allocator role at On
about.demoIntro: Everything on this site is synthetic data rendered from deterministic seeds. It is a self-initiated prototype of how a modern allocation console could feel — combining demand-led replenishment, missed-sales detection, size performance and stock-imbalance analysis. Not affiliated with On AG.
about.hobbiesCopy: When I'm not building allocation tools, you'll find me on ski slopes through winter, on mountain trails through summer, and most weekends patiently teaching our recently-adopted pup that the Limmat riverside is for walking — she firmly disagrees with the ban on sniffing every flower along the way.

kpi.stockHealthHelp: % of SKU-locations with healthy stock cover (2-8 weeks)
kpi.sellThroughHelp: Units sold ÷ available stock, last completed week
kpi.stockOutsHelp: SKU-locations with 0 inventory and demand last 4 weeks
kpi.inTransitHelp: All open POs across the network
kpi.forecastMapeHelp: Mean absolute percent error, last 8 weeks
kpi.newInHelp: Products launched in the last 26 weeks
kpi.missedRevenueHelp: Lost sales from stock-outs and size gaps (last 4 weeks)
kpi.imbalanceCostHelp: Weekly carrying cost of cover dispersion across the network

imbalances.title: Stock imbalances
imbalances.subtitle: SKUs where one store has excess cover while another is running low

risks.title: Risks & opportunities
risks.subtitle: A weekly action view: what's about to go wrong, and where the next revenue lives
risks.riskSubtitle: SKU-locations predicted to stock out in the next 6 weeks
risks.opportunitySubtitle: Overstock pockets that can fund redistributions

categories.title: Category performance
categories.subtitle: Roll-up view for the merchandise planning conversation

stores.title: Stores
stores.subtitle: Network health per store — click a row to drill into SKU-level detail
stores.name: Store

sizes.title: Size performance
sizes.subtitle: Store × size heatmap — spot stock-out patterns that aggregate views hide
sizes.storesOut: {n} store(s) out of stock at this size

po.title: In-transit purchase orders
po.subtitle: Stock arriving from suppliers and inter-DC transfers

dashboard.title: Global allocation overview
dashboard.subtitle: Network-wide health of inventory, sales velocity and forecast risk
dashboard.salesByRegionHelp: Units sold per week, last 26 weeks
dashboard.stockByRegionHelp: Average weeks of cover across SKUs
dashboard.atRiskHelp: Stock-out predicted within 2 weeks at current sell-through

products.title: Product catalog
products.subtitle: Active SKUs across the global allocation network

allocation.title: Demand-led allocation
allocation.subtitle: Replenishment recommendations driven by observed sell-through and store-level demand signals — not a monolithic season forecast
allocation.methodology: Each recommendation is triggered by a live demand signal (velocity, upcoming campaign, size gap) rather than the pre-season plan.

simulator.title: Scenario simulator
simulator.subtitle: Test the impact of marketing investment on demand and stock cover

footer.disclaimer: Demo portfolio project. Product names and brand are © On AG, used for non-commercial demonstration only. All data is synthetic.
footer.stack: Built with Next.js, next-intl, Recharts and Tailwind
